name: Mexican Pork Roast Cooked in Beer w/ Green Sa
recipeIngredient: 5 lb loin or shoulder pork roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a small skillet. Saute onion and garlic until limp.
2. Drain tomatillos and reserve the liquid.
3. Combine tomatillos, 1/2 cup reserved liquid, chopped onion, garlic, olive oil, oregano, and cilantro in a jar of an electric blender; puree.
4. Heat skillet over moderate heat. Pour in sauce.
5. Cook 10 minutes. Remove from heat and add wine vinegar, salt, and pepper.
6. Chill sauce; serve with pork.
